title: PP Custom Sky
description: Adds a pixelart custom sky. From XSSheep's Pixel Perfection. Requires Optifine.
body:
This resource pack adds a pixelart custom sky. From [XSSheep ](https://www.minecraftforum.net/members/XSSheep?__cf_chl_jschl_tk__=0cd05e71855cf2e8f211c9be122b2d9798fb86ca-1594543114-0-AXuCk8wmp99Q2MLjHOpHpVxrxoPjK70-Nt948w1ABLQPhkDmAKDyldwSZU9wCbrjgULVlrXWpSufWdiIIykCD__10vLmD_-tfkNffpsZBLqAsrp_6-wFOm3KLRyZ-ecDVmcUpWtbt_VZfqtoO_T0soWb-8WLLYQFbdKE72LiDstvcnvhmJzpcJNVMF9aYhLmAhLJ52epgEza9J9KZ64uY--ykq8Jr5NQZ2hu_Jj1He7KHoDsHQuPBoNNEI3fVeF8XCO3rxYpfoKvOGMznGDB0r6iNOgUFhTuLAOehjIYYTNH)'s Pixel Perfection, It can now be played on modern versions. **[Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)** is required, this pack does nothing on its own.

It's recommended to use [Rounded Sun & Moon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rounded-sun-moon-souralien)

All credits to **[XSSheep ](https://www.minecraftforum.net/members/XSSheep?__cf_chl_jschl_tk__=0cd05e71855cf2e8f211c9be122b2d9798fb86ca-1594543114-0-AXuCk8wmp99Q2MLjHOpHpVxrxoPjK70-Nt948w1ABLQPhkDmAKDyldwSZU9wCbrjgULVlrXWpSufWdiIIykCD__10vLmD_-tfkNffpsZBLqAsrp_6-wFOm3KLRyZ-ecDVmcUpWtbt_VZfqtoO_T0soWb-8WLLYQFbdKE72LiDstvcnvhmJzpcJNVMF9aYhLmAhLJ52epgEza9J9KZ64uY--ykq8Jr5NQZ2hu_Jj1He7KHoDsHQuPBoNNEI3fVeF8XCO3rxYpfoKvOGMznGDB0r6iNOgUFhTuLAOehjIYYTNH)**.

# DEPENDENCIES

- [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) (REQUIRED)
- [Rounded Sun & Moon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rounded-sun-moon-souralien) (RECOMMENDED)
